subcodes.first_line: O My Name! Upon thee be My glory! We have heard the call of those who turned unto the All-Merciful when He came with sovereignty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اسمی علیک بهائی انا سمعنا ندآء الذین اقبلوا الی الرحمن اذ اتی بسلطان
subcodes.subjects: @piety; righteousness; fear of God [taqwa], @prayer for spiritual recognition, @wisdom [hikmat], @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
